target.title: feat: add devcontainer for cross-platform development
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: OpenClaw cannot be fully developed on Windows — shell-based tests and setup scripts require Linux.
- Why it matters: Contributors on Windows need a portable, reproducible dev environment.
- What changed: Added a `.devcontainer/` setup (Dockerfile + devcontainer.json) with Node 22, pnpm, GitHub CLI, Copilot CLI, and Claude CLI. Includes docs, tests, nav entry, and labeler update.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): No changes to runtime, gateway, or existing Docker/Podman production images.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [x] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [ ] UI / DX
- [x] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- N/A
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

N/A

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

N/A — new feature with 22 dedicated tests in `src/devcontainer.test.ts`.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

- New `.devcontainer/` directory enabling `Dev Containers: Reopen in Container` in VS Code.
- New docs page at `docs/install/devcontainer.md`.
- Works with both Docker and Podman container runtimes.

## Diagram (if applicable)

N/A

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? No
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? No — host credentials are bind-mounted read-only or passed via env vars.
- New/changed network calls? No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? No
- Data access scope changed? No

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: Windows (host), Debian bookworm (container)
- Runtime/container: Docker or Podman

### Steps

1. Open repo in VS Code
2. Click `Reopen in Container`
3. Run `pnpm test src/devcontainer.test.ts`

### Expected

- Container builds successfully with all tools available.
- All 22 tests pass.

### Actual

- Same as expected.

## Evidence

- [x] Failing test/log before + passing after
  - 22/22 tests pass locally on Windows via `pnpm test src/devcontainer.test.ts`.

## Human Verification (required)

- Verified scenarios: All 22 tests pass, doc formatting clean (oxfmt), markdown lint clean.
- Edge cases checked: Name is OpenClawDev, no port forwarding, no sudo, no root.
- What you did **not** verify: Actual container build with Podman (will be tested by contributor).

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [ ] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? Yes
- Config/env changes? No
- Migration needed? No

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: Host mount paths (`~/.ssh`, `~/.config/gh`) may not exist on fresh systems.
  - Mitigation: Documented in troubleshooting section with `mkdir -p` instructions.
